holdings.infoBox: BOBP is an equity ETF with a total of 52 individual holdings. The top holdings are State Street SPDR Bloomberg 1-3 Month T-Bill ETF stock at 9.51%, Sandisk at 4.34%, Lam Research at 3.79%, KLA Corporation at 3.58%, and Micron Technology at 3.53%.

overview.description: The CORE16 Best of Breed Premier Index ETF (BOBP) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Core16 Best of Breed Premier index. The fund tracks an equal-weighted index of 50 US large-cap equities with perceived capital appreciation potential while minimizing short-term volatility. The fund employs a continuous 10 to 20% cash drag on the portfolio. BOBP was launched on May 20, 2025 and is issued by CORE16.
